channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: Japan’s Pacific Moment: Recalibrating Japan’s Pacific Islands Engagement
item.description: A pivotal shift is underway: Japan is quietly redefining its role in the Pacific Islands, navigating intensifying strategic competition while reshaping its diplomatic and development playbook.

item.title: The Infrastructure Trap: What Beijing Has Learned from Moscow’s Playbook in Central Asia
item.description: President Xi Jinping’s decision to announce what would become the Belt and Road Initiative in Kazakhstan in 2013 was no accident. For thousands of years, Central Asia was the land corridor for the Silk Road.
